id.description: The unique identifier for the message.

contentType.description: The content type of the body (e.g., text, html).

content.description: The text content of the Copilot response.

citations.description: Sources referenced in the Copilot response.

title.description: The title of the cited source.

url.description: The URL of the cited source.

snippet.description: A relevant snippet from the cited source.

createdDateTime.description: The timestamp when the message was created.
